description: This file defines negation in the Going-to Future construction in Njo Viri (Balanda). The construction expresses planned or intended actions that will not happen.

general_principle.statement: Going-to future negation in Balanda is formed using either the negative auxiliary 'willa' or the copula-based negation 'ma ... gba'. Both patterns negate an intended future action.

willa_pattern.structure: Subject + willa + tiyai + va + Verb(base) + (Object / Complement)
constraints: Do not add 'gba' in this pattern

ma_gba_pattern.structure: Subject + ma + tiyai + va + Verb(base) + (Object / Complement) + gba

shared_constraints: The connector 'va' must link to the final base verb
The final verb must remain in base form
Do not use 'ti-' on the final verb

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va ja se
english: I am not going to eat fish

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va nzü ngo
english: She is not going to drink water

balanda: Danda ma tiyai va teli muru famvara gba
english: We are not going to sleep on the bed

balanda: Uku willa tiyai va yai
english: Uku is not going to go

balanda: Ngande ma tiyai va dhii ba gba
english: Ngande is not going to come home

balanda: Ndi willa tiyai va nonö gbi difo
english: They are not going to walk in the compound

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va nangele zanga
english: She is not going to run fast

balanda: Uku ma tiyai va mande gbi njü gba
english: Uku is not going to work in the garden

balanda: Wiki willa tiyai va moliki gbi difo
english: The child is not going to play in the compound

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va loro voro gba
english: I am not going to watch the dog

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va vele njo balanda
english: I am not going to speak Balanda

balanda: Wilii ma tiyai va sudi kavoso gba
english: The girl is not going to write words

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va dheke kitabu
english: I am not going to read a book

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va teri ay gba
english: He is not going to think about it

balanda: Ndi willa tiyai va ŋiyi ay
english: They are not going to know it

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va we ndi gba
english: I am not going to ask them

balanda: Ngande willa tiyai va vele zi ndi
english: Ngande is not going to tell them

balanda: Wilii ma tiyai va keye ti naa ni gba
english: The girl is not going to call her mother

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va merego ŋo
english: I am not going to love you

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va maguku ti kpörö gba
english: He is not going to fear the snake

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va sogo ni
english: She is not going to hate him

balanda: Ngande ma tiyai va riki ni gba
english: Ngande is not going to surprise him

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va dovee kurru
english: He is not going to seem calm

balanda: Wilii ma tiyai va yele tamma gba
english: The girl is not going to tie the shoe

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va di kalla
english: He is not going to cut the pot

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va tele njokoji gba
english: I am not going to pull the door

balanda: Danda willa tiyai va turu songo
english: We are not going to push the box

balanda: Wilii ma tiyai va soko tamma gba
english: The girl is not going to wash the shoe

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va kuru kavokau
english: I am not going to hide the beads

balanda: Ngande ma tiyai va ngö tiyi gba
english: Ngande is not going to build a house

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va suru kavoso
english: I am not going to create words

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va giri kavoso gba
english: She is not going to change the words

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va kara njokoji
english: I am not going to turn the door

balanda: Danda ma tiyai va toko villi gba
english: We are not going to add money

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va kefo Balanda
english: I am not going to describe Balanda

balanda: Ndi ma tiyai va konu nvesani gba
english: They are not going to help the poor

balanda: Ngande willa tiyai va ndugu mira
english: Ngande is not going to initiate the project

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va maforo mira gba
english: I am not going to contribute to the project

balanda: Wilii willa tiyai va sarwa kumere
english: The girl is not going to separate trash

balanda: Danda ma tiyai va kiri tidina gba
english: We are not going to uphold the law

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va duru ngo
english: I am not going to want water

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va ze villi gba
english: She is not going to give money

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va dhe villi
english: I am not going to find money

balanda: Uku ma tiyai va mele vongu gba
english: Uku is not going to try the cloth

balanda: Ngande willa tiyai va si ba
english: Ngande is not going to leave home

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va lu Wau gba
english: I am not going to arrive in Wau

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va fagi mva
english: He is not going to sharpen the knife

balanda: Ngande ma tiyai va dewe kakpodu gba
english: Ngande is not going to imitate adults

balanda: Danda willa tiyai va bita mira
english: We are not going to start the project

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va teta gba
english: He is not going to fall
